title: Baghaei: 'framework agreement' 30-60 days — nuclear NOT in current talks, sanctions in text
snippet: Iran FM spokesperson Baghaei described the draft as a 'framework agreement.' Details in 30-60 days. 'Over the past week, the trend has been toward narrowing differences.' Nuclear issues NOT part of current negotiations. Sanctions lifting 'explicitly included in the text.'
tag_reason: New: Baghaei's framework agreement framing with 30-60 day timeline and nuclear exclusion.
